name: Dunya al Dananir
overview: Nafi is a simple man, who enjoys good manners in his work, and his skill at work, but after receiving a promotion at work, his colleague Ibrahim is jealous of him and causes him to be accused of embezzlement from the company, and Nafa tries to prove his innocence.

trailers.title: مسلسل دنيا الدنانير الكويتي Minimum of dinars 1981
